top_signals.title: Gold Steadies After Fresh US Strikes in Iran Cloud Rate Outlook
top_signals.summary: Gold traded in a narrow range as investors sought clues on the Federal Reserve’s outlook for interest rates, with renewed US airstrikes on Iran stoking concerns around a return to higher energy prices and inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China's rare missile test will push wary Asia-Pacific countries to close ranks, analysts say
top_signals.summary: China's rare launch of a ballistic missile launch into the Pacific will push regional powers to deepen their defense ties.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Maine Senate race replacements circle amid pressure on Platner to drop out
top_signals.summary: Democrat Graham Platner has denied allegations of sexual assault leveled by Maine resident Jenny Racicot as calls for him to exit the pivotal race mount.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
